name: Stained Glass Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and butter together until smooth.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Add the chopped walnuts and colored mini marshmallows to the cooled mixture.
4. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Shape the mixture into a log on an 18-inch piece of waxed paper.
6. Cover the log with flaked coconut.
7. Lift the ends of the waxed paper, wrap them around the roll, and pinch together to fully cover it.
8. Refrigerate for at least 3-4 hours before slicing.
9. Slice the cooled cookies into approximately 1/2 inch thick slices.
